programmes.show_description: (2022) Darkly comic social media satire. Wannabe influencer Danni Sanders (Zoey Deutsch) creates a fake Insta-life, but her lies spiral out of control in the real world. With Dylan O'Brien.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1960) Fantasy adventure. Claude Rains plays a scientist who, convinced that dinosaurs still roam the earth, sets off into the Amazon to find them. Based on Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's novel.
(2007) Animated comedy. When Homer's love for a pig causes world-threatening pollution, Springfield gets enclosed in a huge dome. D'oh! Will he do the decent thing and save his neighbours?
(2022) Family comedy with Michael Peña. A young lad discovers that his slacker dad is a superhero. And before he's got used to the idea, he must foil a villain's plot to bring his dad down.
(1972) Action adventure. Gene Hackman stars as a priest who leads a ragtag group of survivors on a life-or-death quest to escape from the capsized ocean liner Poseidon.
(2016) Toby Jones and Catherine Zeta-Jones lead a stellar cast in a reboot of the comedy classic. The hapless Home Guard platoon gets involved with D-Day. But there's a spy in their midst.
(2018) Revenge thriller with Jennifer Garner. A mum turns vigilante on a quest for justice when her husband and daughter are murdered by a drug cartel.
(2023) Maximilian Erlenwein's breath-holding underwater survival thriller about two sisters on a fateful diving expedition, starring Louisa Kause and Sophie Lowe.
(2019) Fact-based caper starring Jennifer Lopez and Constance Wu. A group of high-end strippers enjoy lucrative success by drugging rich men into spending their money.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1974) Frank Langella plays a Mexican nobleman who returns home to find officials bleeding the country dry. So he dons a black mask and cape and becomes the avenging Zorro.
(2005) Comedy starring Steve Martin and Bonnie Hunt. The Bakers and their 12 kids go on holiday to a rural camp, where a friendly rivalry develops with a family who have eight children.
(1997) Action thriller starring Pierce Brosnan and Linda Hamilton. The inhabitants of a volcano-side resort unwisely ignore a scientist's warning about its imminent eruption.
(2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.
(2019) Will Smith stars in Ang Lee's action-thriller as both an over-the-hill hitman and the young clone of himself sent to take him out. With Clive Owen.
(1993) Western. Kurt Russell stars in the story of legendary Wild West lawman Wyatt Earp told through the medium of the moustache. With Val Kilmer as 'Doc' Holliday and Charlton Heston.
(2018) Unrestrained reboot of the franchise defined by a ruthless extraterrestrial killer whose name says it all... and it's had a DNA upgrade. All the better to kill you with, my dear.
